channel.title: Epic Fury Live — US-Iran War Tracker
channel.description: Live tracking of the US-Israel-Iran conflict. Real-time updates, verified casualties, evidence, and analysis.

item.title: Japan begins release of oil reserves as Iran war sparks energy crisis
item.description: Tokyo's move comes as oil prices remain elevated amid the effective closure of the Strait of Hormuz.

item.title: Large protest held in London against US-Israeli war on Iran
item.description: Thousands of demonstrators took to the streets of London to oppose US-Israeli aggression against Iran, Lebanon and Gaza.

item.title: Stars at Oscars 2026 call for end to war in Gaza and Iran
item.description: Actors and filmmakers spoke out at the Oscars 2026 in Los Angeles against the US-Israeli war on Iran and the genocide.

item.title: Nobody wants to get involved’ in Strait of Hormuz military operations
item.description: Charles Kupchan says the US and allies are reluctant to use military means to safeguard the Strait of Hormuz.

item.title: Oil prices keep rising as Trump seeks coalition to reopen Strait of Hormuz
item.description: Brent crude tops $106 a barrel as markets see no end in sight to the halt of traffic through the critical waterway.

item.title: US-Israeli strike pounds city of Hamadan, Iran
item.description: Footage shows huge plumes of smoke from a US-Israeli strike on Hamadan, Iran.

item.title: Iran war live: Trump threatens NATO if allies fail to help on Hormuz
item.description: Iran's Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi says Tehran never sought a ceasefire with the US, and is ready for a long war.

item.title: Top Trump adviser says Iran war price tag at $12bn so far
item.description: Pressure grows on the US president's administration as war costs spiral and the mission's endgame remains unclear.

item.title: Muted response as Trump urges nations to escort ships through Hormuz Strait
item.description: The US president's call for allied naval forces comes as Iran's Revolutionary Guard says, 'Let him send his ships'.

item.title: What’s the impact of the Iran war on China?
item.description: The US-Israel war on Iran rages on and China says it should never have happened.
